arts.ttl: Spurs near €25m centre-back signing with medical booked
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are closing in on the signing of Kevin Danso from Lens with a medical booked for the defender. Spurs have agreed a package worth €25m (£20.9m) for the Austria international, who will provided much needed cover at centre-back in the absences of Cristian Romero and Radu Dragusin. arts.sum: A depleted Tottenham side travel across the capital this Sunday to face Brentford at the Gtech Community Stadium. The Lilywhites dropped to 16th on Saturday after Everton’s resounding 4-0 triumph over Leicester City saw the Toffees overtake Ange Postecoglou’s side.
